title: Yueshop 10 PCS Christmas Flowers Large (15CM) Poinsettia Glitter Flower Christmas Tree Hanging Party Xmas Decor(Silver)
features: Package information: 10 pcs Christmas tree flowers heads + 10 Pcs green soft stings(tie the flowers to the branches). Each size is 5.9in/15CM, enough quantity for you to decorate Christmas tree,window,door and other places in your warm room.

Quality material：These artificial poinsettia flowers are made of quality PE and glitter powder,safe,non-toxic to the human body,durable to use,will not break easily,and the color is not easy to fade,has long service time. Beautiful ornament hanging on the Christmas Tree
Perfect for the Christmas Tree, these delightful baubles design are sure to brighten up any tree.
Hung on Christmas trees to fit your ornamental trees perfectly. These bling flowers can be used in your home, party , garden, Wedding , etc.
description: Product Description Gorgeous & Textured Christmas flowers Three layers of petals with different design, the flowers look more distinct and full. Each flower has glittery powder, which are very shiny and gorgeous, increasing the atmosphere on Christmas. Perfect Size & Multifunction The diameter of the poinsettia flower is approx: 5.9”/15cm. Be made of premium PE and glitter powder. Not only can be used for Christmas wreath, gift box, Christmas tree other decoration, also will remain beautiful and sparkling throughout the Christmas holiday. 10 Pcs Green Soft Stings Package: 10 Pcs Christmas poinsettia + Green Soft Stings. Easy to insert the stem into flowers, specially customized for Christmas tree. Note: Due to long distance transport, some glitter powder will drop from flowers, that is normal.
